data.title: Global M&A activity to continue momentum in 2026 with 80% of executives aiming to sustain or increase deals post-rebound in 2025, says Bain & Co survey. Technology, geopolitics, and portfolio strategies to drive M&A trends in 2026.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Bain revealed that 80% of merger and acquisition (M&A) executives anticipate maintaining or growing deal volume in the year 2026. This positive outlook follows a significant resurgence in deal-making in 2025. Factors such as technology disruption, geopolitical events, the post-globalization landscape, and changing portfolio approaches are expected to influence M&A trends in 2026. For example, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming increasingly prevalent in M&A processes, signaling a shift towards more tech-driven strategies in the industry.

data.title: SpotDraft receives $8M funding from Qualcomm Ventures to enhance AI-driven contract management for business legal teams.
data.description: SpotDraft, a company based in New York, has recently received funding from Qualcomm Ventures to enhance its AI-driven contract lifecycle management service tailored for corporate legal departments. This investment is aimed at scaling up the capabilities of SpotDraft's innovative technology to streamline contract processes for businesses.

data.title: MindWalk utilizes HYFT® to detect functional adjacency in AI therapeutics, impacting drug discovery risk. ($HYFT)
data.description: An Austin-based company known as MindWalk Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: HYFT) revealed today their innovative use of the HYFT® technology to detect functional adjacency. This method allows for the potential discovery of various molecules that can yield similar therapeutic benefits despite appearing unrelated upon sequence comparisons. This breakthrough addresses a growing concern in the pharmaceutical industry regarding legal, competitive, and valuation risks in drug development. MindWalk is at the forefront of this advancement in bio-native AI therapeutic research and technology.

data.title: ONE Data and Rockefeller Foundation to launch Development Finance Observatory in 2026. Analysis shows 124% increase in MDB financing, decrease in Chinese finance to Africa. US$4M collaboration.
data.description: A recent analysis marking the commencement of a collaborative effort totaling US$4 million has uncovered a significant 124% surge in financing from Multilateral Development Banks (MDBs). In contrast, there has been a noticeable decline in Chinese financial support exiting developing nations, notably impacting Africa the most. The findings from Washington on Jan. 27, 2026, shed light on the shifting patterns of international funding to developing economies.

data.title: US News & World Report released 2026 Best Online Programs rankings to aid students' career aspirations.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, U.S. News & World Report released its annual 2026 Best Online Programs rankings, showcasing the top programs in various fields. These rankings aim to assist students in making informed decisions about furthering their education and career prospects.

data.title: Huawei partners with Eliud Kipchoge's dsm-firmenich Running Team, introducing next-gen running watch.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 26, 2026, The dsm-firmenich Running Team, which includes renowned marathoner Eliud Kipchoge, revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Huawei on January 5, 2026. Huawei has become their official technology partner, uniting with the exceptional team, recognized as the leading force in the industry.
